schema.title: Report Document
schema.description: Typed JSON document for LLM-authored reports. Generated from manifest.json for Go validators, JS dispatch metadata, and downstream type bindings.

presentationNotes.mermaid_node_labels:
Node labels with line breaks MUST be wrapped in double quotes and use `
`. Bare `\n` is rendered as two literal characters by mermaid v11. Correct: `A["line 1
line 2"]`. Wrong: `A[line 1\nline 2]`. Applies to every node shape (`[]`, `()`, `{}`, `(())`, `[[]]`, `[()]`).
presentationNotes.image_src_constraint: `image.src` must be `https://…` or `data:…` URI. Local paths (`file://`, `/var/...`, etc.) break the single-file deliverable promise — the rendered HTML must remain self-contained even after being moved or shared.
presentationNotes.markdown_in_text_fields: Inline markdown (bold, italic, links) is supported in: `paragraph.text`, `callout.text`, `quote.text`, `list` items, `table` cells, `definition.def`, `faq.a`. Block-level markdown (headings, lists) inside these fields is NOT supported — use the dedicated surface for those.
presentationNotes.additional_properties_rejected: Every section schema is `additionalProperties: false`. Adding fields not declared in `$defs/section.<type>` fails validation. Don't try to smuggle metadata via undeclared keys; if a field is missing, file a real schema change.
presentationNotes.section_if_visibility: Any section may include `if`: a boolean literal or `{"$bind":"cell"}`. When false, HTML hides the section; Markdown skips it. The bound cell can be `state` or `computed`.
presentationNotes.diagram_over_mermaid: For flowcharts and sequence diagrams, prefer `diagram` (with `kind: flow` or `kind: sequence`) over raw `mermaid`. The `diagram` surface accepts structured fields (nodes/edges/actors/messages) and the renderer generates correct mermaid syntax — no escaping or DSL traps. Use `mermaid` only when `diagram` cannot express the picture (subgraphs, custom shapes, Sankey, C4, ER, class diagrams).

paragraph.usage: 散文段落，body 支持 inline markdown

examples.text: **Cloudflare** 成立于 2009 年，总部位于旧金山。
Premature optimization is the root of all evil.

code.usage: 代码块，带 lang 字段

list.usage: 项目符号 / 编号列表，items 可嵌套

items.a: 冷启动从秒级降到毫秒级。

mermaid.usage: ESCAPE HATCH ONLY: 自定义形状/subgraph/Sankey/C4 等 diagram 表达不了的图。优先用 diagram。

examples.code:
flowchart LR
  A["用户"] --> B["边缘节点"]
  B --> C["源站"]

diagram.usage: 结构化图形,kind=flow|sequence|quadrant|tree|state。AI 填字段,渲染器生成 mermaid。优先级高于 mermaid。

image.usage: 图片，src 必须 https:// 或 data: URI

input.usage: UI 控件（绑定到 state cell）

stat.usage: KPI 单值卡，value 可绑定到 cell

columns.usage: N 列并排（最多 4 列）

aside.usage: 侧边/插入说明，可嵌套 sections

initial.description: id of the starting state — emits `[*] --> id`

final.description: ids of terminal states — each emits `id --> [*]`

lookup_table.doc: VLOOKUP-style discrete lookup. Last row with null match is the default.

format_date.doc: Format ISO date / timestamp using YYYY MM DD HH mm ss tokens.
